meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn a high-efficiency client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code designed for intermediate freelancers.
content.answer_block: To scale, you must move from manual coding to architecture-first automation. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you standardize your output. This workflow reduces development time by 70%, allowing you to manage multiple high-value client projects simultaneously without sacrificing code quality or speed.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'manual labor loop.' Every new client project feels like a blank canvas, wasting hours on boilerplate and repetitive configuration. You’re billing for expertise, but you’re spending your time fighting architecture drift and context switching. The ceiling on your income isn't your talent; it’s your process.

It is time to build an 'Antigravity' engine for your freelance business. By decoupling your business logic from the underlying infrastructure, you turn every client project into a modular, repeatable assembly line. This is the shift from 'freelance coder' to 'systems architect.'

steps.title: Standardize Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Stop starting from scratch. Define your gold-standard project structure in Antigravity to ensure every client project is production-ready from commit one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized SaaS boilerplate structure including authentication, database schema (PostgreSQL/Prisma), and API routing. Use clean architecture principles with clear separation between domains and infrastructure.

steps.title: Automate Context Injection
steps.description: Feed Claude Code your specific design system and coding standards so every feature it generates matches your signature style.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase style guide and generate a system instruction file that enforces naming conventions, error handling, and component modularity.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Prototyping
steps.description: Use Claude Code to build out client features based on your validated Antigravity architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a user dashboard module that fetches data from the standardized API layer defined in step 1, using the project's existing UI component library.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement user dashboard with data table and auth guard'

steps.title: Automated Code Review Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code as your lead engineer to audit the generated code against your architectural requirements before client handover.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current module for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks, ensuring it adheres to the strict performance standards defined in the project docs.

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Deployment
steps.description: Finalize the workflow by automating deployment scripts, ensuring client handoff is as simple as a git push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs automated tests and deploys the build to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'master' boilerplate repo that you pull updates from using Git submodules to keep all client projects synchronized with your latest best practices.
Use Claude Code to generate comprehensive README.md files for every client; documentation is the highest-leverage asset for reducing post-project support tickets.
Implement a 'dry-run' phase in your Antigravity prompts where you ask for an architectural diagram before generating a single line of code.
Cache your most complex prompt chains in a local 'library' directory to avoid repeating the effort of teaching the AI your preferred patterns.
Turn your client's business requirements into a structured JSON schema before passing them to Claude Code to ensure the output is strictly typed and predictable.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your last three projects to identify the common patterns you manually repeated, then turn those patterns into your first Antigravity boilerplate template.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for manual labor and start building a scalable engine that works for you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
